title: Sugar Cane update
description: A resource pack that improves the sugar cane model, making it more realistic.
body:
![Render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce0084f8edce92ebe3165260b2ef71a3cc4e8900.png)

A resource pack that improves the sugar cane model, making it more realistic.

![Ingame screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5de8894396e14768eaf75b713a70c5e0db7312f7.png)

No mods required, just vanilla Minecraft

New item texture:
![New item texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/422a4243bce63dc732297cb5c6b8b6f28045554a.png)

New model:
![New model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7ab9a0add0333d99ca45f259585962e323ede4c.webp)
